title: Journal of Energy Physics
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Journal of Energy Physics''''' was a scientific magazine where [[Nasdra Magrody]] published articles about his study of directed thought waves. He believed that it was through these articles that [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] came to believe he was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
